references.text: Kool, R. 1988. Ixonanthaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 10: 621-627

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 8 May 2026

species.citation: Blume , Mus. Bot. 1 (1851) 396 ; Kool, Blumea 26 (1980) 199; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1988) 626; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific biodiv. 17 (2024) 11. = Ixonanthes philippinensis Elmer , LPB 10 (1939) 3758, nom. inval., no Latin descr.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, ?New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand. HOMONHON, LUZON: Sorsogon, SULU ARCHIPELAGO, TAWI-TAWI.

species.citation: Jack , Malayan Misc. 2 (1822) 51 ; Kool, Blumea 26 (1980) 200; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1988) 626. = Ixonanthes longipedunculata Merr. , PJS 17 (1920) 264 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 325.
species.distribution: Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. BUCAS GRANDE (photos), DINAGAT (photos), HOMONHON (photos), MANICANI, MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), Surigao del Norte.
